Meaning.Vi: Thẻ (nhựa, giấy, bìa cứng); lá bài (trong trò chơi)
Meaning.En: A thin piece of stiff paper, plastic, or other material, typically rectangular and used for writing, printing, or playing games.
Meaning.Example: She handed me her business card after the meeting.

Situation.Vi: Giao thiệp, giới thiệu bản thân bằng thẻ tên
Situation.En: Exchanging or presenting a business card during a professional introduction.

Situation.Vi: Chơi bài bằng bộ bài tây
Situation.En: Playing card games such as poker or bridge using a deck of playing cards.

Meaning.Vi: Thẻ tín dụng / thẻ ghi nợ
Meaning.En: A small plastic or metal card issued by a bank or financial institution, used to make purchases or withdraw cash.
Meaning.Example: I paid for the groceries with my debit card.

Situation.Vi: Mua sắm trực tiếp bằng thẻ ngân hàng
Situation.En: Swiping or tapping a credit or debit card to pay for goods or services.

Meaning.Vi: Bài thi, phiếu đánh giá (trong giáo dục)
Meaning.En: A sheet of paper used for tests, assessments, or evaluations, especially in standardized testing.
Meaning.Example: The students filled out their answer sheets and submitted the test cards.

Situation.Vi: Thí sinh làm bài thi trên phiếu trả lời trắc nghiệm
Situation.En: Students completing a multiple-choice exam using a separate answer card or sheet.
